name: The 'command' of God mentioned here is not a formal legal injunction from God, but
introduction:
that inherent urge with which the nature of both men and animals has been imbued and
which is apprehended instinctively.
(The verse means, therefore, that after the end of the menstrual course people may again
engage in sexual intercourse - Ed.)
